work.title: Founding Frontend & Web3 Dev (Remote)
work.description:
- Built the **MVP of Assurative**, an **on-chain lending protocol** on **Base network** enabling guaranteed yield on deposits
- Integrated **wallet providers** (Privy), **Gnosis Safe** tooling (**Safe Global**, **PalmeraDAO**), and on-chain **payments**
- Ensured seamless **UX** and **Web3 functionality** across the entire product
- Currently retained as a **founding advisor**

work.title: Backend Developer (Remote)
work.description:
- Built the **entire backend** for Aranyaaa's clothing web app using **PHP** and **MySQL**
- Collaborated closely with the frontend team for seamless **API integration**
- Led **digital marketing**, **SEO**, keyword research, and content strategy

work.title: Full Stack Dev & Digital Marketer (On-Site)
work.description:
- Boosted **online sales** across **Amazon**, **Flipkart**, and **Myntra** through marketplace optimization
- Ran **paid ads** on Instagram, Facebook, and Google for lead generation
- Led **full web app development** for the brand from scratch

projects.title: MusicValue
projects.description: Fan-backed music investment platform built on **Solana**. Fans invest in artists and tracks they love, and earn a share of the **royalties** those tracks generate. Think of it like buying a small stake in a song.

projects.title: Axon
projects.description: First decentralized **Bitcoin mining pool** on **Solana**, enabling even the smallest miners to earn **BTC with no minimum payout threshold** using a micropayments protocol built on Stratum v2.

projects.title: BrandVoice
projects.description: **AI-powered branding & marketing platform** built with Google ADK. Acts as your virtual content team, copywriter, designer, and marketing strategist all in one.

projects.title: Finlearn AI
projects.description: **Personalized financial education** platform that adapts to your learning style and financial goals, built for the Perplexity AI Hackathon.

projects.title: ApturaX
projects.description: **AI Agent on Aptos** that delivers real-time chain updates to **X (Twitter)** automatically, built for the Metamove AI Hackathon.

hackathons.title: Solana Graveyard Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built MusicValue, a fan-backed music investment platform on Solana where fans earn royalty shares as the tracks they back grow in popularity.

hackathons.title: Solana Privacy Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built Private x402, a privacy-preserving payment SDK for Solana implementing the HTTP 402 Payment Required protocol using Privacy Cash, enabling private API monetization on-chain.

hackathons.title: Cypherpunk Hackathon · SuperteamIN
hackathons.description: Built Axon, a Solana-based micropayments solution for small Bitcoin miners. Won the 100xDevs bounty track run by SuperteamIN.

hackathons.title: UniteDeFi Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built TrueValue, a platform to invest in music NFTs created by artists and earn yield as the music grows in popularity. Built on SUI and Ethereum.

hackathons.title: Google ADK Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built BrandVoice, an AI-powered branding and marketing platform using the Google Agent Development Kit.

hackathons.title: Perplexity AI Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built Finlearn AI, a personalized financial education platform that adapts to your learning style and financial goals.

hackathons.title: Colosseum Breakout Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built ABS Finance, an AI-powered DeFi tool that finds and allocates assets to the highest-yielding Solana vaults automatically.

hackathons.title: Redacted Hackathon · Solana
hackathons.description: Built Solanautics, a wallet tracking and smart money tool using the Solscan API with price alerts and wallet following.

hackathons.title: Metamove AI Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built ApturaX, an AI Agent on Aptos that posts real-time chain updates to X (Twitter) automatically.

hackathons.title: Solana Radar Hackathon
hackathons.description: Built an on-chain lending platform on Solana in the DeFi track, enabling users to earn guaranteed yield on their deposits.

education.description:
- Selected for **100xSchool Super30 3.0**, an **intense 6-month sprint** focused on shipping real products
- Attending **IRL hackathons**, collaborating with top builders, and accelerating hands-on learning
- Goal: **ship fast**, grow through doing, and make the most of every opportunity

- Completed **Turbin3's Q1 2026 Builders Program**, one of the most rigorous Solana developer curricula
- Shipped a **capstone project** and finished all weekly assignments to earn graduation
- Deep-dived into **Anchor smart contracts**, **PDAs**, **CPIs**, and advanced **Solana architecture**

- Completed **School of Solana Season 7** by Ackee Blockchain Security
- Built multiple **Solana on-chain projects** with a focus on security and correctness
- Gained strong foundations in **program security**, **account validation**, and **exploit prevention**

- Attended Randamu's **Threshold Cryptography Bootcamp**, a niche, highly technical program
- Learned core concepts of **Threshold Cryptography**, **VRFs** (Verifiable Random Functions), and **distributed key schemes**
- Built projects using **Randamu tooling** and explored real-world applications in **trustless randomness**

- Completed **Cohort 3** covering **Full Stack Web Development**, **DevOps**, and **Blockchain**
- Built and deployed production-grade **web applications** with modern tooling
- Learned **CI/CD**, **system design**, containerization with **Docker**, and cloud deployment
- Explored **Web3 integrations**, smart contracts, and on-chain app development

- Started with **Graphic Design**, **Video Editing & VFX**, and **Digital Marketing**, built a strong creative foundation
- Transitioned into coding: **Python**, **HTML/CSS**, then **PHP** backend systems
- Landed an **internship as a Graphic Designer** during the program
- Won **multiple certificates and trophies** over 3 years of continuous learning and building
